1#!/usr/bin/env bash
3 markers="${1: -AB}"
4 m start="${markers:0:1}"
5 m_end="${markers: 1:1}"
7 context="Context 1"
9 if II -f ./t2 ]]; then
10
t2_settings=./t2
11 else
12
t2_settings="$HOME/.t2"
13 fi
14
15 m1=$(t2marker-time.sh "$m_start" "context" "$t2_settings")
16 m2=$(t2marker-time.sh "$m_end" "$context" "$t2_settings")
7 m diff="$(echo -n "($m2 - $m1)/1000" | bc -i)" # seconds
18
19 echo "time diff: $m_diff"
20 test_start="$(t2marker.sh "$m_start" "$context" "st2_settings") "
21 test completed="$(t2marker. sh "$m end" "$context" "$t2_settings")"
22
23 echo "stest_start - §test_completed: "
24
